storyHook: 打开页面，搜索信息，保存结果

narrative.when: 周四下午，做一份学校的报告
narrative.who: 甲（学生）· 乙（同学，远程一起查资料）
narrative.how: 打开浏览器，输入关键词搜索
narrative.method: 打开页面、输入关键词、阅读结果、保存有用的信息
narrative.event: 甲的报告明天就要交，还差一些资料没查到

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, let me get the net going.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Is it up? My side is slow today.
turns.zh: 连上了吗？我这边今天有点慢。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, it is up. I will open the net now.
turns.zh: 连上了，我现在打开网络。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. What do we put in the box?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The name of the theory, and the year.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. I will put that in now.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, let us do it together.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. Ready? Go.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Done. The page is full of answers.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Great. Let us look at the first one.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: This one has a good list of points.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, but is it from a true book?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It says from a school library. That is good.
turns.zh: 写着来自学校图书馆，没问题。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. Let me take the key words.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will do the same on my side.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: What about the second one?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It has a picture, but not much writing.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Pictures are good for our talk.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: True. I will keep it open.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Have you seen the third one?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, it is a paper from a school.
turns.zh: 看到了，是大学的一篇论文。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is what we need for the theory part.
turns.zh: 这正是我们理论部分需要的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will take the important lines.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I am doing the same here.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. Our work is coming together.
turns.zh: 好，我们的内容快凑齐了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Let us put our notes together.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good idea. I will make a new list.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I have sent you the net place.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Got it. I am copying my bits now.
turns.zh: 收到了，我正在复制我的部分。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: This page has a good table of numbers.
turns.zh: 这个页面有张好数据表。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will take a picture of it with my little box.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Then put the picture in the paper.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. I am doing that now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: We have enough for the paper now.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes. Let us go over the list again.
turns.zh: 是的，我们再过一遍清单。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I have the key points here. Do you see them?
turns.zh: 我这里有要点。你看到了吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, I will put a note.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. This part from the third page is good.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will put it with my notes. That makes sense.
turns.zh: 我把它放到笔记里。说得通。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. We are almost done. One last look?
turns.zh: 对。我们快完了。最后再过一遍？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will have another look at the last page.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Do you see the table with numbers?
turns.zh: 你看到那个数字表格了吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, I have it here. It is good.
turns.zh: 看到了，我这儿有。挺好的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Put that in the paper?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, it makes the point stronger.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will do it now. One minute.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Take your time. I am reading the notes.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Done. It is in the paper.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. That is the last bit we needed.
turns.zh: 好，这就是我们最后需要的那部分。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. Let us put it away and go to bed.
turns.zh: 行，那收起来然后睡觉吧。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will look at the other page now.
turns.zh: 我现在看看另一个页面。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Which one? The third one?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, it has a good table of numbers.
turns.zh: 对，它有个不错的数字表格。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I see it. The numbers are clear.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Put them in the paper?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, but only the first two lines.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. I will copy them now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Do you have the name of the man who made it?
turns.zh: 你有写这个东西的人的名字吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, it is at the top of the page.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. That is all we need from here.
turns.zh: 好。我们这里要的就这些了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Let us see the other page.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, open it. I will see what is there.
turns.zh: 好，打开它。我看看有什么。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: This one has a picture with notes.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The notes are short. That is good.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will take the picture for my part.
turns.zh: 我把图片用到我那一部分。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Do you have the number under it?
turns.zh: 你记下它下面的数字了吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, I have it here. It is 238.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is a good number to put in the paper.
turns.zh: 那个数字放进报告里不错。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. I will put it with the other notes.
turns.zh: 好的。我把它和别的笔记放一起。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Then we are done with this page.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Let us see the page after this now?
turns.zh: 我们现在看后面那页吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, open it. I will have a look at the first bit.
turns.zh: 好，打开吧。我先看看开头部分。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: This page has a table with numbers.
turns.zh: 这页有个带数字的表格。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The numbers go with the notes we have.
turns.zh: 这些数字跟我们的笔记对得上。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will put the table in my notes.
turns.zh: 我会把表格放进我的笔记里。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Do you see the day at the top?
turns.zh: 好。你看到顶上的日期了吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, it is 2023. That is the right year.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Then we have all we need from this page.
turns.zh: 那这页我们需要的东西都齐了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will put a mark here so we come back.
turns.zh: 我在这儿做个标记，方便以后回来。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. Now for the last page.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will put the page number at the top.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Then we have a clean record.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Let us get the notes from page two.
turns.zh: 我们拿第二页的笔记吧。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, I have them open here.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: The first part is about the old system.
turns.zh: 第一部分讲的是旧系统。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is what we need to start the writing.
turns.zh: 这正是我们开始写作所需要的。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will take a short note on that part.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Do you see the note about the new system?
turns.zh: 你看到关于新系统的笔记了吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, it is in the middle of the page.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will put that in my notes as well.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, I have all I need now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Is it all right if we keep the rest for another time?

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, let us keep the best bits.
turns.zh: 行，把最有用的留着就行。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will put this in a new folder.
turns.zh: 我把这个放进新文件夹。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good idea. Name it after the day.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Done. It is safe now.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will send you my notes in a bit.
turns.zh: 我待会儿把笔记发给你。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is good. I will do the same.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: We have enough for the notes now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. Let us stop here.
turns.zh: 差不多了。咱们就到这儿吧。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. I will shut the other windows.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Keep only the working one.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I put the best bits in a box.
turns.zh: 我把最好的部分存进盒子里了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will do the same now.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Are we to send notes to one another?

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, I will send mine in a minute.

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I have got your notes. They are good.
turns.zh: 我收到你的笔记了。不错。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Those are good too. We are ready.
turns.zh: 你的也很好。我们准备好了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will shut down now. I will go now.

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: See you. Hope the talk goes well.

storyBlurb: 报告明天截止，甲还差关键资料没查。他打开浏览器，和同学乙远程协作，终于找到并保存了所需信息。
storyScript:
【开场·打开浏览器】周四下午，阳光斜照进房间。甲坐在书桌前，屏幕亮起，他双击浏览器图标，等待页面加载。网络连接成功，光标在地址栏闪烁，仿佛催促着他。甲深吸一口气，手指敲击键盘，输入搜索关键词。

【进行·搜索阅读】搜索结果页面弹出，密密麻麻的链接。甲快速扫视标题，点开第一个看起来相关的页面。文字和图片加载出来，他眯起眼睛，一行行阅读。旁边手机传来乙的消息提示音——乙也在远程查找。甲把重点段落复制到文档里，又打开第二个标签页。时间一分一秒过去，他对比不同来源的信息，眉头时而紧锁时而舒展。乙发来一个截图，标注了关键数据。甲回复一个OK手势，继续筛选。

【进行·搜索阅读】第三个页面是一篇论文摘要，甲读完后眼前一亮——这正是他需要的理论支撑。他滚动页面，找到引用部分，小心地复制下来。屏幕右下角弹出乙的共享文档，里面已经整理好了几个要点。甲把自己的发现也粘贴进去，两人的成果渐渐汇合。他瞥了一眼时钟，还剩两小时，但心里踏实了许多。

【收束·保存关闭】甲把最后一段有用信息存入本地文件夹，文件名标注好日期和主题。他关闭多余的标签页，只留下乙的共享文档。乙发来消息：“差不多了，我这边也收工。”甲回复一个笑脸，然后点击保存按钮，确认所有资料已备份。他合上笔记本，屏幕暗下去，房间恢复安静。明天，报告就能顺利完成了。
